---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new developer workflow or cloud capability for DeckOps
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What developer or operations problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, command, or workflow you would like.

## Cloud Context

If relevant, explain:

- whether this is for local CLI use, CI, or backend automation
- whether new token scopes or permission checks may be needed
- whether the request affects task creation, file access, or workspace isolation

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative designs you considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, sample commands, or links to related issues.
